goal: Use Windows Computer Use to create a safe layered poster demo in Photoshop.

gui_steps.instruction: Open Photoshop and create a new 1080 by 1350 RGB document.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Stop and record that Photoshop could not be opened.

gui_steps.instruction: Create a background layer with a solid color or gradient.
gui_steps.expected_screen_state: The Layers panel contains a background layer.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Leave the default background and continue.

gui_steps.instruction: Add main title, subtitle, geometric decoration, and explanatory text layers.
gui_steps.expected_screen_state: Named text and decoration layers are visible.

gui_steps.instruction: Export a PNG preview or save a PSD under outputs/photoshop_demo/.
gui_steps.expected_screen_state: The save or export dialog targets outputs/photoshop_demo/.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Cancel the dialog and record the failed export.

expected_result: A layered poster demo and screenshot evidence from Photoshop.
